channel.title: Donate to Möbius on Moebius
channel.description: Recent content in Donate to Möbius on Moebius

item.title: Another bank
item.description:
Another bank

Check the instructions for another bank, usually the process of setting up a standing transfer is quite similar between banks.

If it doesn’t work or you want to contribute in another way, you can email: mat-kassor@utn.se and we can arrange it!

If you have chosen to donate at least 50 SEK per month, you are eligible to receive the Möbius magazine (when it's printed)! Fill in here so we can reach you when the next issue is printed.

item.title: Danske Bank
item.description:
Danske Bank

  1. Open the Danske Bank app or online banking, and go to pay
  2. If you want to make a one-time donation, create a regular transfer. Otherwise, create a standing transfer by clicking the button under fixed payments
  3. Press “+” to create a new standing transfer
  4. Select “To others”
  5. Enter amount, the name Möbius and account-clearing number 84202 8143866641
  6. Press Next, and then select “Every month”
  7. Press Next, and then go to confirmation
  8. Check that everything is correct, and then approve the payment. Thank you for your contribution! :))

item.title: Donate via Swedbank
item.description:
1. Open the Swedbank app or Swedbank online banking
  2. Press Pay and Transfer
  3. Press Pay and Transfer again
  4. Press select recipient
  5. Press the + button to add a new recipient
  6. Select Bank account
  7. Write Möbius and then write the account-clearing number 84202 8143866641
  8. Select any amount, then decide if you want to make a one-time donation or monthly donation
  9. Then add the payment; thank you for your contribution! :))

item.title: Handelsbanken
item.description:
Handelsbanken

  1. Open Handelsbanken online banking (i.e. the website, not the app) if you want to make a monthly donation, otherwise if you want to make a one-time donation you can also do it via the Handelsbanken app.
  2. Go to pay and transfer. Click on standing transfer if you want to make a monthly donation, and then select to create a new standing transfer. Otherwise create a regular transfer.
  3. Create Möbius as a new recipient with account-clearing number 84202 8143866641 (note that this is a Swedbank account, i.e. select the button “Other bank”)
  4. Enter amount, and make sure it says Yes under the button “Until Further Notice” if you want to make a monthly donation.
  5. Check that everything is correct, and then approve the payment. Thank you for your contribution! :))

⚠️ Note that a fee may apply to certain standing transfers!

item.title: Länsförsäkringar
item.description:
Länsförsäkringar

  1. Open the Länsförsäkringar app or online banking and go to transfer
  2. Select the account you want to transfer from, then select recipient and add a new recipient with account-clearing number 84202 8143866641
  3. Select amount, and then select “Recurring transfer” if you want to make a recurring donation. If so, select monthly.
  4. Check that everything is correct, and then approve the payment. Thank you for your contribution! :))

item.title: Link
item.description: If you have chosen to donate at least 50 SEK per month, you are eligible to receive the Möbius magazine (when it’s printed)! Fill in here so we can reach you when the next issue is printed.

item.title: Nordea
item.description:
Nordea

  1. Open the Nordea app or Nordea online banking
  2. Press Pay and Transfer
  3. Under account transfer, press Select bank
  4. Scroll down and select Swedbank
  5. Then enter account-clearing number 84202 8143866641, enter the name “Möbius” and click Continue
  6. Select any amount, and then decide if you want to make a one-time donation or monthly donation
  7. Check that everything is correct, and then confirm the payment. Thank you for your contribution! 🙂
